query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS extendedResponsePrompts (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, courseId INT NOT NULL, title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, prompt TEXT NOT NULL, instructions TEXT, rubricCriteria JSON, exampleEssay TEXT, exampleScore INT, createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (courseId) REFERENCES courses(id)); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS studentEssaySubmissions (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, userId INT NOT NULL, promptId INT NOT NULL, essayText TEXT NOT NULL, score INT, feedback TEXT, submittedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id), FOREIGN KEY (promptId) REFERENCES extendedResponsePrompts(id));
